3283590.name: Saturday Night Racing
3283590.description:
Get ready for a blast from the past!

Step into the driver’s seat in Saturday Night Racing, a retro-inspired arcade racer inspired by the golden age of 1990s American stock car racing and the exciting world of local short track racing. Rev your engines, dust off those fenders, and prepare to tear up the track!

  • Stock Car Action: Feel the rush of competitive oval racing, with high-powered stock cars, roaring engines, and thrilling wheel-to-wheel action.

  • Fast Paced, No-Nonsense Racing: Forget the long, drawn-out sim races. In Saturday Night Racing, it’s all about quick and intense sprints. Hit the track, get your heart racing, and see who comes out on top.

  • Tight, Action-Packed Tracks: Featuring both small and large asphalt and concrete ovals where every move counts. Close quarters racing means there’s no room for mistakes—bump, jostle, and push your way to the front.

Game Features:

  • Saturday Night Thunder: A progression mode where you compete to win all Signature Events and compete in head-to-head duels to become the Track Champion at each track while earning fans along the way.

  • Online Leaderboards: Challenge yourself to become the world ranking driver! Compete for the fastest lap on each track and climb the global leaderboards.

  • Steam Achievements: Unlock a variety of Steam achievements as you conquer podiums, set new lap records, and become the track champion.

  • Steam Deck Optimization: Resolution and graphics options are configured to allow a smooth gameplay experience on the Steam Deck. Use of trackpads is required to navigate game menus.

  • Difficulty Settings & AI Optimization: Tailor the experience to your abilities with 3 difficulty levels and 3 tire grip settings. Race against the AI opponents who will alter their racing lines, draft, and lift for the player accordingly.
3283590.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
